chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 495 of 2022 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on Office objection at Flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.1984/2022 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 14.12.2022 Mr. Khan Muhammad Sangi, Advocate along with petitioner Mr. Rafique Ahmed Baloch, Advocate for respondents 3 and 5 Mr. Noor Hassan Malik, Assistant Advocate General <><><><>..<><><><> Learned Counsel appearing for respondents 3 and 5 while referring the statement / comments filed on behalf of the said respondents on 23.06.2022 states that the applications of the petitioner dated 01.02.2022 and 22.04.2022 referred to an prayer clause (a) of the petition could not be decided by the respondent No.3 since pendency of instant petition. He further states that in case the petitioner withdraws this petition, the aforementioned applications shall be decided by the competent authority within thirty days. In view of the aforementioned submissions, learned counsel for the petitioner does not press instant petition, which stands dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
